item.title: Page state UB: current page state is Typed
item.body:
```
Hello world from guest kernel!


thread 'rustc' (67340) panicked at src/mirch/physical_mem.rs:164:9:
Page state UB: current page (paddr=0x1200000, index=4608) state is Typed { page_type: PageTable, slot_size: 8 }, 
while the expected should be Unused

error: the compiler unexpectedly panicked. This is a bug

note: we would appreciate a bug report: https://github.com/rust-lang/miri/issues/new

note: please make sure that you have updated to the latest nightly

note: please attach the file at `/home/zjp/KMiri/tests/init/target/osdk-miri/init-miri-base/rustc-ice-2026-06-27T13_00_17-67295.txt` to your bug report

note: rustc 1.96.0-nightly (55e86c996 2026-04-02) running on x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu

note: compiler flags: --crate-type bin -C embed-bitcode=no -C debuginfo=2 -C incremental=[REDACTED] -Z unstable-options -C link-arg=-Tmiri.ld -C relocation-model=static -C relro-level=off -C force-unwind-tables=yes -C no-redzone=y -C target-feature=+ermsb

note: some of the compiler flags provided by cargo are hidden

query stack during panic:
end of query stack

comments.body:
Codex Explains

1. `Hello world from guest kernel!` 说明来宾内核已经启动并执行到打印点了。 2. 随后 Miri 在执行过程中触发了一个**内部断言 panic**： `Page state UB: current page state is Typed { page_type: PageTable, slot_size: 8 }` 3. 触发位置在 `https://github.com/KMiri-rs/KMiri/blob/b7b4215bba9100c3c6fba0533a6d411de9a116e3/kmiri/src/mirch/physical_mem.rs#L164` 的 `check_page_state`，也就是 KMiri/Miri 的“物理页状态检查器”发现了未定义行为（UB）。 更直白地说： 某个物理页当前被标记为“页表页（PageTable）”，但后续代码把它当成了别的用途（例如普通可分配页/堆对象页）在用，于是状态机检查失败并 panic。 从你的调用栈看，关键路径是： - `https://github.com/KMiri-rs/asterinas/blob/fa9d7573f86d41858dd2cc7488d199ea7057d8ae/ostd/src/mm/frame/allocator.rs#L64` `crate::arch::kern_miri_alloc_pages(paddr, 1);` - 这发生在堆分配链路里（`slab` / `heap allocator` / `BTreeMap` 分配节点） - 再往上是 `KVirtArea::map_frames`、`KernelStack::new_with_guard_page`、`TaskOptions::build` 所以很可能是在“为内核栈或相关虚拟内存结构映射/分配 frame”时，拿到了一个在 Miri 视角下已经是 `PageTable` 类型的物理页，导致冲突。 为什么显示成 “compiler unexpectedly panicked / ICE”？ - 这是 Miri 作为解释器运行时 panic，外层表现成 rustc ICE。 - 不一定是 rustc 本身 bug；在你这个上下文里，更像是**被测内核代码或 KMiri 页面状态标注逻辑**触发了 Miri 的内部检查。 一句话总结： **内存页类型不一致：同一物理页被当成了页表页和普通数据页两种角色。**

```
...

[kern_miri_retype_pages] paddr=0x1201000..0x1202000 => Typed { page_type: PageTable, slot_size: 8 }
[kern_miri_alloc_pages] paddr=0x1202000..0x1203000

[kern_miri_retype_pages] paddr=0x1202000..0x1203000 => Typed { page_type: PageTable, slot_size: 8 }

region: 0x0..0x1000000 => Kernel
region: 0x1000000..0x8000000 => Usable
  r1: 0x1203000..0x8000000
  r2: 0x1203000..0x8000000
Adding free frames to the allocator: 1203000..8000000

[kern_miri_alloc_pages] paddr=0x120f000..0x1210000
...

[kern_miri_alloc_pages] paddr=0x20fc000..0x20fd000
[kern_miri_retype_pages] paddr=0x20fc000..0x20fd000 => Typed { page_type: Slab, slot_size: 8 }
...
[kern_miri_alloc_pages] paddr=0x210e000..0x210f000
[kern_miri_retype_pages] paddr=0x210e000..0x210f000 => Typed { page_type: Slab, slot_size: 128 }

root_pt=0x1000
[boot_pt dismiss] pa=0x1202000
[Frame drop/delloc] paddr=0x1202000..0x1203000
[boot_pt dismiss] pa=0x1201000
[Frame drop/delloc] paddr=0x1201000..0x1202000
[boot_pt dismiss] pa=0x1200000
[Frame drop/delloc] paddr=0x1200000..0x1201000

Hello world from guest kernel!

[kern_miri_alloc_pages] paddr=0x1200000..0x1201000

thread 'rustc' (74202) panicked at src/mirch/physical_mem.rs:165:9:
Page state UB: current page (paddr=0x1200000, index=4608) state is Typed { page_type: PageTable, slot_size: 8 }, 
while the expected should be Unused
